function random(){if(typeof crypto!=='undefined'&&typeof crypto.getRandomValues==='function'){const arr=new Uint32Array(1);crypto.getRandomValues(arr);return arr[0]/4294967296;}return Math.random();}export function getBasePPG(ovr,position){const basePPG=(ovr-59)/40*24+4;const positionMultiplier={'PG':0.9,'SG':1.0,'SF':1.05,'PF':1.15,'C':1.1};return basePPG*(positionMultiplier[position]||1.0);}export function getGameVariance(){const rand=random();if(rand>0.85)return 5+random()*5;if(rand<0.10)return-5-random()*5;return(random()-0.5)*6;}export function getMinutesPlayed(isStarter,requestedMinutes){if(requestedMinutes)return requestedMinutes;if(isStarter)return 30+Math.floor(random()*8);return 8+Math.floor(random()*14);}// Generate realistic basketball stats that sum to team total
export function generateTeamBoxScore(players,teamScore,isWinner){const boxScore=[];let pointsRemaining=teamScore;// Sort by OVR to determine rotation (top 10 players play in real NBA)
const sortedPlayers=[...players].sort((a,b)=>b.ovr-a.ovr);const rotation=sortedPlayers.slice(0,10);// Only top 10 play
const dnp=sortedPlayers.slice(10);// Rest get DNP
// NBA-realistic usage rates based on OVR - MORE AGGRESSIVE
const usageShares=rotation.map((player,index)=>{const isStarter=index<5;if(!isStarter){// Bench players (6-10): low usage
return 0.10+player.ovr/100*0.08;// 0.10-0.18
}// Starters (1-5): MUCH more aggressive usage for stars
if(player.ovr>=90){// Superstar: 32-45% usage (can take over games)
return 0.32+(player.ovr-90)*0.013+random()*0.13;}else if(player.ovr>=85){// Star: 26-35% usage
return 0.26+(player.ovr-85)*0.018+random()*0.09;}else if(player.ovr>=80){// Good starter: 20-28% usage
return 0.20+(player.ovr-80)*0.016+random()*0.08;}else if(player.ovr>=75){// Decent starter: 16-22% usage
return 0.16+(player.ovr-75)*0.012+random()*0.06;}else{// Weak starter: 12-18% usage
return 0.12+(player.ovr-65)*0.006+random()*0.06;}});const totalUsage=usageShares.reduce((sum,u)=>sum+u,0);// Generate stats for rotation players
rotation.forEach((player,index)=>{const isStarter=index<5;const minutes=getMinutesPlayed(isStarter,player.requestedMinutes);// Skip players with 0 minutes (DNP)
if(minutes===0){boxScore.push({playerId:player.id,playerName:`${player.firstName} ${player.lastName}`,minutes:0,points:0,fgm:0,fga:0,tpm:0,tpa:0,ftm:0,fta:0,rebounds:0,assists:0,steals:0,blocks:0,turnovers:0,fouls:0});return;}// Distribute points based on usage
let points;const normalizedUsage=usageShares[index]/totalUsage;if(index===rotation.length-1){// Last rotation player gets remaining points
points=Math.max(0,pointsRemaining);}else{const basePoints=teamScore*normalizedUsage;// Add hot/cold variance - superstars can REALLY go OFF
let varianceMultiplier=1.0;const hotColdRoll=random();if(player.ovr>=88){if(hotColdRoll>0.85){// Superstar explosion (15% chance) - 50-80% boost!
varianceMultiplier=1.5+random()*0.3;}else if(hotColdRoll<0.12){// Superstar cold night (12% chance)
varianceMultiplier=0.50+random()*0.25;}}else if(player.ovr>=82){if(hotColdRoll>0.80){// Star great game (20% chance) - 30-55% boost
varianceMultiplier=1.30+random()*0.25;}else if(hotColdRoll<0.15){// Star cold night
varianceMultiplier=0.55+random()*0.25;}}else if(hotColdRoll<0.15){// Regular players just have cold nights occasionally
varianceMultiplier=0.60+random()*0.25;}points=Math.max(0,Math.round(basePoints*varianceMultiplier));pointsRemaining-=points;}// Calculate shooting stats based on points and player OVR
const fgPercent=0.38+player.ovr/100*0.22;// 38-60% based on OVR
const tpPercent=0.28+player.ovr/100*0.17;// 28-45% 3PT
const ftPercent=0.65+player.ovr/100*0.25;// 65-90% FT
// Estimate shot distribution
const threePointRate=player.pos==='C'?0.15:player.pos==='PF'?0.25:0.35;const freeThrowRate=0.20;const pointsFrom3=Math.round(points*threePointRate);const pointsFromFT=Math.round(points*freeThrowRate);const pointsFrom2=Math.max(0,points-pointsFrom3-pointsFromFT);const tpm=Math.floor(pointsFrom3/3);const tpa=Math.max(tpm,Math.round(tpm/Math.max(0.25,tpPercent)));const ftm=pointsFromFT;const fta=Math.max(ftm,Math.round(ftm/Math.max(0.5,ftPercent)));const fgmFrom2=Math.floor(pointsFrom2/2);const fgm=fgmFrom2+tpm;const fga=Math.max(fgm,Math.round(fgm/Math.max(0.3,fgPercent)));// Other stats based on position and minutes
const rebounds=Math.max(0,Math.round((player.pos==='C'?8:player.pos==='PF'?6:3)*(minutes/36)*(player.ovr/75)*(random()*0.4+0.8)// 80-120% variance
));const assists=Math.max(0,Math.round((player.pos==='PG'?7:player.pos==='SG'?3:2)*(minutes/36)*(player.ovr/75)*(random()*0.4+0.8)));const steals=Math.max(0,Math.round((1.2+random()*0.5)*(minutes/36)*(player.ovr/85)));const blocks=Math.max(0,Math.round((player.pos==='C'?1.8:player.pos==='PF'?0.8:0.2)*(minutes/36)*(player.ovr/75)));const turnovers=Math.max(0,Math.round((player.pos==='PG'?2.5:1.5)*(minutes/36)*(1.2-player.ovr/100)// Better players turn it over less
));const fouls=Math.max(0,Math.round(2*(minutes/36)*(random()*0.6+0.7)));boxScore.push({playerId:player.id,playerName:`${player.firstName} ${player.lastName}`,minutes,points,fgm,fga,tpm,tpa,ftm,fta,rebounds,assists,steals,blocks,turnovers,fouls});});// Add DNP entries for players outside rotation
dnp.forEach(player=>{boxScore.push({playerId:player.id,playerName:`${player.firstName} ${player.lastName}`,minutes:0,points:0,fgm:0,fga:0,tpm:0,tpa:0,ftm:0,fta:0,rebounds:0,assists:0,steals:0,blocks:0,turnovers:0,fouls:0});});return boxScore;}// Legacy function - kept for backwards compatibility
export function generatePlayerGameStats(player,isStarter,teamWon){let requestedMinutes=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:null;const basePPG=getBasePPG(player.ovr,player.pos);const variance=getGameVariance();const minutes=getMinutesPlayed(isStarter,requestedMinutes);const winBonus=teamWon?2+random()*1.5:0;const pointsPerMinute=(basePPG+variance+winBonus)/36;const points=Math.max(0,Math.round(pointsPerMinute*minutes));const rebounds=Math.max(0,Math.round((player.pos==='C'?8:player.pos==='PF'?6:3)*(minutes/36)*(player.ovr/80)));const assists=Math.max(0,Math.round((player.pos==='PG'?6:player.pos==='SG'?3:2)*(minutes/36)*(player.ovr/80)));const steals=Math.max(0,Math.round((1+random()*0.5)*(minutes/36)*(player.ovr/90)));const blocks=Math.max(0,Math.round((player.pos==='C'?1.5:player.pos==='PF'?0.5:0.1)*(minutes/36)*(player.ovr/80)));return{points,rebounds,assists,steals,blocks,minutes};}
